content:
I am delighted to share that I have successfully completed my internship at Majesty International Legal Review (MILR), the research body of The Majesty International.

During this internship, I had the opportunity to strengthen my legal research, academic writing, and analytical skills while working on contemporary legal issues. It was an enriching experience that deepened my understanding of legal scholarship and the importance of rigorous research.

One of the most rewarding aspects of this internship was authoring a research paper titled "The Marital Rape Debate in India," which was subsequently published on the official web portal of the Majesty International Legal Review (MILR). 

I sincerely express my gratitude to the entire team at Majesty International for their guidance, encouragement, and for providing me with this valuable opportunity. The experience has further motivated me to continue learning, researching, and contributing to the legal field.

Looking forward to many more opportunities for growth and learning.

comment: Legal research on sensitive issues like marital rape requires balancing doctrinal analysis with lived realities, evidence, and the practical impact of any proposed legal reform.
